$comment: Phase 7 sprint 2 benchmark dataset (Day 213). Skeleton 5 件 + Phase 6 spec gen と registered theorems から拡張、計 12 件 + extended output schema (statement_ok / proof_ok / tool_used / time / heartbeats / failure_class).

input_schema.id: Lean theorem identifier (matches PI-19 SemanticEquivalence registry where applicable)
input_schema.shape: trivial / rewriting / constructor / arithmetic / quantified / higher-order
input_schema.expected_solvers: list of solvers expected to succeed (baseline = sorry は常に compile、reference として 0 score 扱い)
input_schema.premises_form: for duper: how to pass premises ([], [*], [h1, h2], etc.)
input_schema.context: optional: required namespace open / hypothesis preamble (for AgentSpec.Manifest theorems)

output_schema.statement_ok: Bool — Lean parse and type check of the statement (without proof)
output_schema.proof_ok: Bool — full compile (statement + proof tactic) success
output_schema.time_ms: Int — wall-clock duration in milliseconds (lake env lean invocation)
output_schema.heartbeats: optional Int — Lean heartbeats consumed (for timeout taxonomy in sprint 3)
output_schema.failure_class: optional string — taxonomy: timeout / missing_lemma / bad_search_space / reconstruction_failure / tooling_failure (sprint 3 で classify)

benchmarks.statement: (p q : Prop) (h : p ∧ q) : q ∧ p
(p q r : Prop) (hpq : p → q) (hqr : q → r) (hp : p) : r
(α β γ : Type) (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (x : α) (y : β) (z : γ) (h1 : f x = y) (h2 : g y = z) : g (f x) = z
(p q : Prop) (h : p ∨ q) : q ∨ p
(P Q : Nat → Prop) (h : ∃ x, P x) (hpq : ∀ x, P x → Q x) : ∃ x, Q x
(a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a
{α : Type} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C
(α β γ : Type) (c : γ) (f : α → β) : (fun (_ : β) => c) ∘ f = (fun (_ : α) => c)
